nasb.text: But the son by the bondwoman was born according to the flesh, and the son by the free woman through the promise.

esv.text: But the son of the slave was born according to the flesh, while the son of the free woman was born through promise.

cnv.text: 但那出於婢女的，是按著肉體生的；那出於自由的婦人的，是憑著應許生的。

ccb.text: 婢女的儿子是按着人的意愿生的，主母的儿子是按着上帝的应许生的。

csbs.text: 那出于女仆的是由肉体生的，那出于自由女人的是藉着应许生的。
